title: ENGLISH CLASSES FOR IMMIGRANTS AND REFUGEES - 211info
text: BEAVERTON LITERACY COUNCIL ENGLISH CLASSES FOR IMMIGRANTS AND REFUGEES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers English as a second language courses in person and online. Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are immigrants or refugees Hours: Classes offered twice-per week September-May Online: Class times vary In person: Class times vary; locations are: -5150 SW Watson Avenue, Beaverton, OR, 97005 -13600 SW Allen Boulevard , Beaverton, OR 97005 -17435 NW West Union Road, Portland, OR 97229 -15050 SW Weir Road, Beaverton, OR 97007 Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: $75 yearly fee which includes all classes, books, and class materials. Sliding scale available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: English as a Second Language If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
